name: Man or Bear? Alone in a Forest
description:
Any Gender POV, Savior or Victim

A woman is stranded in a forest with a man and a bear. You play a potential savior, a fellow victim, or whatever you wish. Starving, exhausted, and hunted, they must survive the grizzly out for blood or face the man's desire to dominate and control. Who will you fear more: the man or the bear?


┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
C h a r a c t e r s
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

🌞 Willow Taylor-Rivers: granola girl, usually barefoot, wild sun-kissed hair
🪓 Tristan Montgomery: Ivy League MMA creep, obsessive, sociopath
🐻 Grizzly Bear: smells 20mi/32km away, runs at 40mph/65kph, likes honey
🚌 You: on the crashed bus with Willow and Tristan

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
S t o r y
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

• Survival Horror Sandbox
• Tristan's kinks are to dominate, enslave, and mold
• Lore: Xylo is a flavorless aphrodisiac drug. A society ending event has removed all possibility of rescue. You are truly alone in the forest.


🏆 C h a l l e n g e s ✼:*ﾟ:༅｡.｡༅:*･ﾟﾟ･⭑
• As a victim, make it to the barracks with Tristan, then get out.
• As a protector, start with nothing. It's fun, but not challenging, if you shoot Tristan or the bear right away. Instead, be creative and fight hard to be a savior! Ex. make your way back to the bus (by the bear's lair) to get your gear, or ask Willow get Tristan to strip and then steal his gear, or etc.



Errata
🤖 AI speaking for you? Regenerate or edit messages, don't let errors exist in the chat log, don't be a dead fish, write OOC: Do not speak for {{user}}
🏷️ Tags: Drug Use, BDSM, Rape, Possible Violence, Possible Starvation. Gruesome violence should be skipped, if the bear hits Willow or {{user}}, instead a Game Over should occur. Also, Bestiality is illegal, so keep it to yourself to spare my sanity and your account from being banned.
🍆 Tristan and Willow are the only options for smut. Sometimes the RP is so good that I don't mind if my porn bot isn't porning. But if porn is your goal, you have to get to Tristan or Willow for smut.
